Name: SwissMedicalSpecialities
Title: SwissMedicalSpecialities
Description: ValueSet for Swiss medical specialty areas (Fachbereiche) used in ambulatory care settings. Based on the regulation document 'Reglement Fachbereiche inkl. Liste der Fachbereiche' valid from January 1, 2026. Declared as fragment: only the codes actually referenced in this IG are listed here.

Name: ChAlisParamTyp
Title: CH ALIS ParamTyp
Description: This value set defines the ParamTyp, which are displayed via CH ALIS Extension ParameterV40.

Name: ChAlisPersonTyp
Title: CH ALIS PersonTyp
Description: This value set defines the PersonTyp.

Name: LKAAT
Title: LKAAT
Description: Externally maintained ambulatory physician tariff catalogue (LKAAT) published by OAAT. Declared as not-present: its codes are referenced from this IG but not enumerated here, because the catalogue is owned and published externally.

Name: BfsMedstats17Admitsource
Title: BFS Medizinische Statistik - 17 1.2.V02 - Aufenthaltsort vor dem Eintritt / Séjour avant l’admission / Luogo di soggiorno prima dell’ammissione
Description: BFS defines variables for medical statistic (german, french, italian) see [BFS](https://www.bfs.admin.ch/bfs/de/home/statistiken/kataloge-datenbanken/publikationen.assetdetail.7066232.html). Unmittelbarer Aufenthaltsort vor dem Eintritt. Wo befand sich BFS der Patient / die Patientin?

Name: BfsMedstats18Admittype
Title: BFS Medizinische Statistik - 18 1.2.V03 - Eintrittsart / Mode d’admission / Genere di ricovero
Description: BFS defines variables for medical statistic (german, french, italian) see [BFS](https://www.bfs.admin.ch/bfs/de/home/statistiken/kataloge-datenbanken/publikationen.assetdetail.7066232.html). Beschreibung der Umstände des Eintritts. Wie wurde der BFS Patient / die Patientin aufgenommen?

Name: BfsMedstats29Dischargeencounter
Title: BFS Medizinische Statistik - 29 1.5.V04 - Behandlung nach Austritt / Prise en charge après la sortie / Trattamento dopo l’uscita
Description: BFS defines variables for medical statistic (german, french, italian) see [BFS](https://www.bfs.admin.ch/bfs/de/home/statistiken/kataloge-datenbanken/publikationen.assetdetail.7066232.html). Behandlung, Pflege, Rehabilitation nach dem Spitalaufenthalt. Es geht darum, den Behandlungserfolg resp. den Abhängigkeitsgrad bei Austritt anzugeben. Nur die am besten zutreffende Kategorie auswählen.

Name: ChCoreEncounterParticipationType
Title: ChCoreEncounterParticipationType
Description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate how an individual participates in an encounter. In Switzerland the primary care physician is added to the extensible base ValueSet.

Name: ChCoreMaritalStatus
Title: ChCoreMaritalStatus
Description: MaritalStatus combined by fhir and eCH-11. See [maritalData - Zivilstandsangaben eCH-11](https://www.bfs.admin.ch/bfs/de/home/statistiken/kataloge-datenbanken/publikationen.assetdetail.349276.html) and/or [BFS Amtlicher Katalog der Merkmale](https://www.bfs.admin.ch/bfs/de/home/statistiken/kataloge-datenbanken/publikationen.assetdetail.349276.html).

Name: AdministrativeGender
Title: AdministrativeGender
Description: The gender of a person used for administrative purposes.

Name: SNOMEDCTBodyStructures
Title: SNOMED CT Body Structures
Description: This value set includes all codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 442083009 (Anatomical or acquired body site (body structure)).

Name: ChargeItemCode
Title: ChargeItemCode
Description: Example set of codes that can be used for billing purposes.

Name: ChargeItemStatus
Title: ChargeItemStatus
Description: Codes identifying the lifecycle stage of a ChargeItem.

Name: ConditionCategoryCodes
Title: Condition Category Codes
Description: Preferred value set for Condition Categories.

Name: ConditionClinicalStatusCodes
Title: Condition Clinical Status Codes
Description: Preferred value set for Condition Clinical Status.

Name: Condition/Problem/DiagnosisCodes
Title: Condition/Problem/Diagnosis Codes
Description: Example value set for Condition/Problem/Diagnosis codes.

Name: Condition/DiagnosisSeverity
Title: Condition/Diagnosis Severity
Description: Preferred value set for Condition/Diagnosis severity grading.

Name: ConditionStage
Title: Condition Stage
Description: Example value set for stages of cancer and other conditions.

Name: ConditionStageType
Title: Condition Stage Type
Description: Example value set for the type of stages of cancer and other conditions

Name: ConditionVerificationStatus
Title: ConditionVerificationStatus
Description: The verification status to support or decline the clinical status of the condition or diagnosis.

Name: ContactPointSystem
Title: ContactPointSystem
Description: Telecommunications form for contact point.

Name: ContactPointUse
Title: ContactPointUse
Description: Use of contact point.

Name: Currencies
Title: CurrencyCode
Description: Currency codes from ISO 4217 (see https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html)

Name: FHIRDeviceTypes
Title: FHIR Device Types
Description: Codes used to identify medical devices. Includes concepts from SNOMED CT (http://www.snomed.org/) where concept is-a 49062001 (Device)  and is provided as a suggestive example.

Name: DiagnosisRole
Title: DiagnosisRole
Description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to express the role of a diagnosis on the Encounter or EpisodeOfCare record.

Name: Diet
Title: Diet
Description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate dietary preferences or restrictions a patient may have.

Name: EncounterLocationStatus
Title: EncounterLocationStatus
Description: The status of the location.

Name: EncounterReasonCodes
Title: Encounter Reason Codes
Description: This examples value set defines the set of codes that can be used to indicate reasons for an encounter.

Name: SpecialArrangements
Title: Special arrangements
Description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the kinds of special arrangements in place for a patients visit.

Name: SpecialCourtesy
Title: Special courtesy
Description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate special courtesies provided to the patient.

Name: EncounterStatus
Title: EncounterStatus
Description: Current state of the encounter.

Name: EncounterType
Title: Encounter type
Description: This example value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the type of encounter: a specific code indicating type of service provided.

Name: ICD-10Codes
Title: ICD-10 Codes
Description: This value set includes sample ICD-10 codes.

Name: Identifier Type Codes
Title: IdentifierType
Description: A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

Name: IdentifierUse
Title: IdentifierUse
Description: Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

Name: CommonLanguages
Title: Common Languages
Description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

Name: LinkType
Title: LinkType
Description: The type of link between this patient resource and another patient resource.

Name: LocationType
Title: Location type
Description: This example value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the physical form of the Location.

Name: ManifestationAndSymptomCodes
Title: Manifestation and Symptom Codes
Description: Example value set for Manifestation and Symptom codes.

Name: NameUse
Title: NameUse
Description: The use of a human name.

Name: PatientContactRelationship
Title: Patient Contact Relationship
Description: The nature of the relationship between the patient and the contact person.

Name: ProcedurePerformerRoleCodes
Title: Procedure Performer Role Codes
Description: This example value set defines the set of codes that can be used to indicate a role of a procedure performer.

Name: QuantityComparator
Title: QuantityComparator
Description: How the Quantity should be understood and represented.

Name: ResourceType
Title: ResourceType
Description: One of the resource types defined as part of this version of FHIR.

Name: ServiceType
Title: Service type
Description: This value set defines an example set of codes of service-types.

Name: v2.0092
Title: v2 RE-ADMISSION INDICATOR
Description: FHIR Value set/code system definition for HL7 v2 table 0092 ( RE-ADMISSION INDICATOR)

Name: v3.ActEncounterCode
Title: V3 Value SetActEncounterCode
Description: Domain provides codes that qualify the ActEncounterClass (ENC)
